docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARRIS, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT FORTUNO, DANIEL DBA BENEFITS EDUCATION CENTER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
